primary.name: Jerrel Armstrong, MBA
primary.title: Partner, Chief Investment Officer
primary.selection_basis: CIO who sets and oversees investment strategy, asset allocation, portfolio construction across all clients - definitive investment decision-maker.
primary.affiliation_asof: team/bio page 2026-07-20; ex-IWP CIO from 2021 (IWP merger)

secondary.name: Thierry J. D. Brunel
secondary.title: Partner, Chief Investment Strategist
secondary.selection_basis: Senior investment partner / chief investment strategist reported to lead the investment committee - co-owns allocation with the CIO.

notes: KEY CORRECTION: our only extract Kathy Lintz is now Managing Partner/Founder (owner/board), NOT the investment lead. New CEO Charlie Willhoit (08/2025). Firm reorganized 2025-26 (IWP Family Office merger). Real investment DM is CIO Armstrong (not on Schedule A). Only info@ published.

primary.name: Baldassare (Baldo) Fodera
primary.title: Managing Member & CCO (founder, sole owner)

secondary.selection_basis: No secondary affirmatively provable - ADV lists Fodera as sole direct owner/officer; site has no team page (cookie-wall).
